dataHeroGestionHumana.title: HGS - Human Management
dataHeroGestionHumana.description: A company providing <bold>human talent management services,</bold> that creates positive impact with technological solutions, <bold>consulting and operations services.</bold>

cardsContrataSoluciones.title: SMEs

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Payroll Software
ProductosgestionHumana.description: We provide an intelligent payroll solution for payroll processing and settlement.

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Contractor Payment Solution
ProductosgestionHumana.description: We stay ahead. We face new market challenges by developing solutions aligned with the constant changes in the world.

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Occupational Health and Safety
ProductosgestionHumana.description: Enables the implementation, maintenance, and control of occupational health and safety management systems.

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Payroll Software
ProductosgestionHumana.description: Provides comprehensive management of your organization's human resources.

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Payroll and HR Solutions for Government
ProductosgestionHumana.description: Facilitates processes, tracking, and evaluation of organizational and human talent areas.

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Economic Benefits Management
ProductosgestionHumana.description: Increase your revenue by recovering money from employee leaves and licenses.

ProductosgestionHumana.title: Emax Payroll
ProductosgestionHumana.description: All Heinsohn's experience in a 100% digital solution, ideal for small and growing companies.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Outsourcing of Administration and Employee Support
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: We understand employees' needs, which is why our team provides constant support to our clients.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Special Human Talent Management Processes
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: We focus our efforts on finding the best talent for companies, conducting selection processes and all the talent management an organization may require.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Occupational Health and Safety Management
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: We create a strategic model that brings together the best professionals in the sector to plan appropriate actions for workers' health and safety.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Payroll and Contractor Payment Automation Outsourcing
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: We run all payroll settlement, auditing, and execution processes for employees as required by the companies.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Outsourcing of Incapacities and Economic Recognitions Management
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: Handling of money transfers, portfolio purchases, disbursements, credit legalization, and generation of documents such as approval letters.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Customer Service and Digital Transformation
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: Our clients are the source of our transformation. Each challenge proposed is the fuel that drives us to grow and create new strategies.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Attraction, Selection, and Workforce Planning
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: We focus our efforts on finding the best talent for companies, conducting selection processes and all the talent management organizations may require.

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Consulting
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: We support organizations in initiatives aimed at ensuring "the right people," are "doing the right things," and "achieving the desired results."

cardsOutsourcingBPO.title: Additional Services
cardsOutsourcingBPO.description: Flexibility models, accounting reconciliations, tax advice regarding withholding, and legal guidance concerning contracts, UGPP advising, and audits.

titleGestionHumana1.title: Hire custom solutions, fit for your organization
titleGestionHumana1.description: Our payroll software is highly customizable, dynamic, and flexible. It is a tool with <bold>100% web technology</bold> that offers an easy, fast, and secure payroll process.

titleGestionHumana2.title: Business Process Outsourcing - BPO
titleGestionHumana2.description: <bold>Formal operational processes and trained personnel</bold> to support your methods for attending to employees, payment calculation, and the reliable delivery of information to third parties.

titleGestionHumana3.title: We are a team
titleGestionHumana3.description: Teamwork is one of our main strategies. We are convinced that collective power is the essential tool to <bold>create innovative solutions.</bold> As a business group, we join forces with large companies that are today <bold>our technological, creative, and financial partners.</bold>

titleGestionHumana4.title: We are the solution for managing human talent in the cloud.

titleGestionHumana5.title: Optimize human resources processes with artificial intelligence

titleGestionHumana7.title: We are Management
titleGestionHumana7.description: We believe in technology as a tool for transforming work environments. <bold>We generate spaces and opportunities</bold> that provide better conditions for employees.
